title: GuardianClaw Pattern Registry
description: Neutral source of truth for a named list of string indicators consumed by both Python and TypeScript validators. Regex patterns are out of scope for v1; only plain lowercased string indicators are supported.

name.description: Stable identifier used as the pattern-sync marker name in generated source files.

kind.description: Only 'indicators' (plain lowercased strings) is supported in v1.

items.description: Lowercased string. Matching is caller-defined (typically substring on text.lower()).
